2.0.1.description: Fix TypeScript 5.9 type errors in crypto.ts — use explicit Uint8Array<ArrayBuffer> to match BufferSource

2.0.0.description: Switch from RSA 4096 (OpenPGP) to ML-KEM-768 post-quantum encryption. Breaking: removes passphrase, renames privateKey to secretKey, uses base64 key format. Old encrypted data cannot be decrypted with new keys.

1.0.1.description: Add chunked upload for large files (<90MB configurable) to support Nextcloud
